title: Before You Trade — the checklist
_note: EVERGREEN pure-value. '[your risk %]' replaced with neutral wording (no invented number).
body:
✅ Before You Trade — the checklist

Run this every single time. No box ticked = no trade.

☐ Did I write my thesis BEFORE entering — not after?
☐ Is my invalidation level defined and clear?
☐ Is my position size set in advance?
☐ Is my risk-per-trade within the fixed limit I set for myself?
☐ Am I reacting to a plan — not chasing a candle?
☐ Have I checked funding / context, not just the price?
☐ Am I calm, not trading on FOMO or revenge?
☐ Can I accept the full loss if invalidation hits?

If you can't check all boxes, the best trade is no trade.

#BeforeYouTrade
